title: Jacy B
lyrics: I don't know if you can hear me walking, rocking, talking to you, can you watch the ball, can you watch it all go through, three-pointed bird, next, next, next, I'm coming in clear, I'll be coming in, yo, my credit, oh, my bucket, oh, my, my, my, my, my, my bucket, oh, in the middle of it all, you fuck me, you fuck demon, and it let it, is it reality, are you just walking down the hall, slay, bargain, rock a whole break, bargain, take it all, make market share, bank, bank, pray to the bank, just a different perspective, just a different perspective, I just need you one more time, and it could be any night, I really know, yeah, if there's a heaven, I know, if there's a more, I just don't, oh, yeah, it's not faithful reasoning, faithful treasoning, hoping for a message now swallowed wide, I said, hoping for the message now swallowed wide, cause you know that humans wear the crown of a whole divided state of being, is time yours, is time mine, is time the one thing that will make us divine, oh, is time the one thing that you wish you had, left again, your lies, my friend, want to read for show, you want to read for show, you shut, now you lost the light, now you lost the spark that made you, you, you, and now you're acting brand new, who the fuck do you think you are? now you lost the light, now you lost the spark that made you, you, you, and now you're acting brand new, who the fuck do you think you are? now you lost the light, now you lost the spark that made you, you, you, and now you're acting brand new, who the fuck do you think you are?
